_meta.purpose: Maps PF2e spell names to mechanical effects that should auto-apply to targets when cast. Used by systems/spellEffects.js.

schema._comment: Each entry is keyed by the spell's lowercase name. Values describe what happens to a target on each save degree of success. The 'effects' array is what gets applied via encounters.addEffect — same shape as systems/effects.js presets.

save._comment: Per-degree effect maps. Keys are degree-of-success names. Each entry is an array of effect objects to apply on that degree, OR a literal value 'damage' to apply spell damage as-is.

fields.alwaysApply: Effects applied regardless of save (e.g. Bane has no save, just hits)
fields.scaling: Optional: how to scale effect values with cast level. e.g. { 'value_per_levels': 2 }
fields.notes: Optional GM-facing notes shown after auto-resolve

bane._comment: Bane is unusual — enemies in the emanation get -1 attack/saves on FAILURE only.

modifiers.description: -1 status penalty to attack rolls and saves vs mental from Bane.
-1 status penalty to attack rolls and saves vs mental from Bane.

bless._comment: Bless has no save — just applies +1 status to attacks for allies you choose.

modifiers.description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls from Bless.

fear._comment: Fear: success = nothing, fail = Frightened 1, crit-fail = Frightened 2 + Fleeing 1 round.

modifiers.description: Frightened 1 — status penalty to all checks. Decreases by 1 each turn.
Frightened 2 — status penalty to all checks. Decreases by 1 each turn.
Fleeing 1 round from Fear (crit fail). Must spend each action trying to flee from the source.

heroism._comment: Heroism (replaces 4th-tier scaling for old Heroism). Status bonus that scales with rank.

modifiers.description: +1 status bonus to attacks, Perception, saves, and skill checks (Heroism).
Slowed 1 for 1 round (success on Slow).
Slowed 1 for 1 minute (failure on Slow). Lose 1 action each turn.
Slowed 2 for 1 minute (crit-fail on Slow). Lose 2 actions each turn.
Commanded — must use first action of next turn obeying the command (or do nothing reasonable).
Commanded — must spend ALL actions next turn obeying the command.
Charmed — treats caster as a trusted friend. Won't act against them (10 minutes).
Charmed for 1 hour — treats caster as a trusted friend.
Dazzled 1 round (success on Blindness).
Blinded — cannot see. -4 to Perception. Until removed.
PERMANENTLY blinded (crit-fail on Blindness). Requires Restoration to cure.
Slowed 1 for 1 round (success on Paralyze).
Paralyzed — cannot act. Off-Guard. Save end of each turn.
Paralyzed for 4 rounds — no save until end of duration.
Drowsy until end of next turn. If damage is taken before then, immediately falls Asleep.
Asleep — Unconscious. Awakens after 1 minute, on damage, or via shake/loud noise.
Calmed — cannot use hostile actions (1 minute, ends if attacked).
Calmed for 1 minute — does not end on attack.
Stupefied 2 (1 round) — penalty to Int/Wis/Cha-based checks and spell DCs.
Stupefied 4 — penalty to mental-based checks and spell DCs.
Stupefied 1 (1 round) from Synesthesia (success).
Stupefied 3, Off-Guard, normal terrain is difficult terrain (Synesthesia).
Off-Guard from Synesthesia.
Stupefied 4, Off-Guard, all terrain is greater difficult terrain (Synesthesia crit).
Off-Guard from Synesthesia.
Prone from Grease — knocked to ground.
Prone from Grease (crit).
Slowed 1 from Tanglefoot.
Immobilized for 1 round from Tanglefoot crit. Escape to break free.
Slowed 1 for 1 round from Hideous Laughter (success).
Slowed 1 + Off-Guard while laughing.
Off-Guard from Hideous Laughter.
Stunned 1 + Slowed 1, then Slowed 1 thereafter from Hideous Laughter (crit).

daze._comment: Daze is a damage cantrip; mechanical effect uses standard /cast damage flow. Stunned only on crit-fail.

modifiers.description: Stunned 1 from Daze crit-fail.
Sickened 1 from Dehydrate.
Sickened 2 from Dehydrate crit.
Soul bound — crit-fail effect. GM adjudicates.
Outcast's Curse 1 stage — -1 to social skills.
Outcast's Curse 2 stages.
Outcast's Curse 3 stages — initial impressions worsened.

false vitality._comment: False Vitality is a buff for self only — included as alias trigger for /cast.

modifiers.description: Temporary HP — apply to self via /hp manually.
Half of any damage to ally is redirected to caster (until removed). Ends if either drops to 0 HP.

true strike._comment: True Strike is self-buff; included so /cast doesn't error. Effect is just a flag on next attack.

modifiers.description: Next attack rolls twice and uses higher result. No fortune effects affect that attack.
Quickened — gain 1 extra action per turn (used to Stride or Strike only). Until end of duration.
Frightened 1 from Agonizing Despair.
Frightened 2 from Agonizing Despair crit.
Mountain Stance — gain +4 status to AC, but Speed reduced (see stance description).
Next Strike rolls 2d20 and uses higher. Replaces True Strike in Remaster.
